## Problem / user need

Describe the user-visible problem you're solving. Why does this matter?

## Proposed solution

What would you build? Keep it short — detailed design belongs in a follow-up.

## Alternatives considered

Brief: why this over other options.

## Scope

- [ ] Frontend
- [ ] Backend
- [ ] Firestore rules
- [ ] Infra / deploy
- [ ] Docs only

## Success criteria

How will we know it's done?

## Open questions / things I'm unsure about
